LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 206, MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL, CALENDAR OF JUL-15-1997, GRANTED ON CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT PAYS PLAINTIFF $250- BY 7/14/97 4:00PM TOWARDS WITNESS' NEW PLANE/TRAVEL ARRANGEMENTS. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE FOR TRIAL TRIAL CONTINUED TO AUG-01-1997 AT 09:00 AM

JUDGE VON BEROLDINGEN, CGALLAGHER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 9:35 AM C/C FROM AN APPEAL FOR A DECISION OFF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER. RESPONDENT PRESENT W/ COUNSEL PATRICK FABIAN AND JOHN BERGMAN. APPELLANT AND HIS COUNSEL NOT PRESENT. PLTF. CALLS RESPONDENT CRAIG HANSEN, SWORN AND EXAMINED. PLTF'S EXH. # 1 - WRITTEN AGREEMENT ID/EV COURT RULES ON THE BENCH, JUDGMENT FOR THE RESPONDENT AND AGAINST APPELLANT FOR $461.54 FOR THE 5 DAYS, $3,789.04 BALANCE OF THE $7,000 WHICH WAS GUARANTEED, PLUS $3,576.92 PENALTY TO A TOTAL OF $7,827.50, $2,000 ATTYS FEES AND $240 COSTS. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBIT W/DRAWN TO PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SLPC INC. DBA SINCLAIR'S PETIT CAFTE--APPELLANT $7,827.50 PRINCIPAL, $2,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,067.50, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
